<includeonly><div class="gap-box" style="background:#fff8e1; border:1px solid #ffe082; border-radius:4px; padding:8px 12px; margin:8px 0; font-size:0.9em;">&#x26A0;&#xFE0F; '''{{{1}}}'''</div></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Gap|What year did this happen?}}</nowiki></code>

Renders a yellow highlighted box indicating missing or uncertain information.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
